project_type: Flutter mobile/desktop app with FastAPI backend
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze in frontend/ directory to confirm no errors
snapshot_or_generated_files: *.g.dart files generated by build_runner for JSON serialization
environment_constraints: No device available for running app, validation via flutter analyze only. No network for pub get - use pre-installed packages.
contribution_requirements: Never work on main branch. Strict null safety. No dynamic types. Separate UI from business logic. Services handle API calls. Frontend never calls Supabase directly. No print statements. No commented-out code. Constants instead of magic numbers. DM Sans body, DM Serif Display headings. Persian Orange #CC5801 sparingly. Error handling on every function. Type safety everywhere.
key_patterns: ConsumerStatefulWidget for screens with Riverpod. ApiService base class for services (extends it, uses dio). StateProvider for state in repositories. GoRouter for navigation with AppRoutes constants. AppColors for colors, AppSizes for dimensions. GoogleFonts.dmSans for body, GoogleFonts.dmSerifDisplay for headings. isDark check for theme-aware colors. @JsonSerializable for models with .g.dart files.
directory_structure: frontend/lib/core/constants/ (app_colors, app_sizes, app_strings, loading_words), frontend/lib/core/utils/ (router.dart), frontend/lib/data/models/ (all models with .g.dart), frontend/lib/data/services/ (api_service base, chat_service, auth_service, etc), frontend/lib/data/repositories/ (auth_repository, chat_repository, settings_repository), frontend/lib/presentation/screens/ (auth/, chat/, settings/, splash/), frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/ (chat/, common/)
